parameters.content:
## Public portfolio demo
This workflow was rebuilt from scratch using synthetic data.

- No credentials
- No private URLs
- No customer data
- No production document identifiers

## Production replacement points
Replace the simulated API and document retrieval nodes with authorized HTTP Request nodes. Configure authentication only inside the private n8n instance.

## Output
The last node produces structured results suitable for Google Sheets, SQL, an ERP, or another application.
